title: progress-snapshot.v1
description: Progress Tracker (Phase 65.4) progress snapshot structure. Assembled by the harness-progress skill from Plans.md and the state file.

current_task.description: One-line summary of the currently in-progress task (first cc:WIP item). Empty string if no WIP task exists.

progress_pct.description: Completion rate (cc:DONE ÷ (TODO+WIP+DONE) × 100, rounded to nearest integer)

commit.description: The hash portion of cc:DONE [hash] (7 chars)

elapsed_minutes.description: Elapsed minutes since session start (read from state file, defaults to 0 if absent)

estimated_total_minutes.description: Estimated total minutes to complete all tasks (read from state file, defaults to 0 if absent)

cost_so_far_usd.description: Estimated cost incurred so far in this session in USD (read from state file, defaults to 0 if absent)

cost_estimate_usd.description: Estimated total cost to complete all tasks in USD (read from state file, defaults to 0 if absent)

alerts.description: Drift detection result alerts (populated in Phase 65.4.3; empty array in this cycle)

_done_recent_items.description: Derived helper for render-html.sh: the 5 most recently completed done tasks
